name: Fooocus — simplified SDXL image generation
description: Streamlined SDXL image generator (Midjourney-style): minimal settings, quality-focused defaults, no prompt engineering required. Serves on port 7865 — open the returned URL in a browser. Downloads its base SDXL checkpoint on first run, so the first launch is slow. Needs ~8 GB VRAM.

requiredResources.description: CUDA GPU; ~8 GB VRAM for SDXL
